raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo es tas KUNGS zit-
tahds ne tohpu / tapehz ar
jums / juhs Jehkaba Behrui
Gals ne irr darrihts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "No juhfo Tehwu Laika
effeet juhs attahpuschees no man-
neem Eikumeem / un ne effeet
tohs turrejschi. Atgreesectees
attak pee mannim/ tad es pee
jums atgreeſchohs / fakka tas
KUNGS Zebnot. Tad fakkat
juhs: Eeksch ka buhs mums at-
greestees?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Buhs weenam Zilwekam
Deewu aplanpht/ ka juhs man-
ni aplanpat? Tad fakkat juhs:
Eeksch ka aplanpam mehs tewi?
Ar teem Definiteem / un ar ta
Pazelschanas-Uppura.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tapehz effeet juhs ar No-
lahdeschann nolahdeti/ tapehz ka
juhs manni aplanpat/ ir tee Lau-
dis wiſsnotak.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Neffeet tohs Desmitus
vilnus mannā Mantu. Nam-
mā / ka Barriba effu mannā
Namimā/ va pahrbaudajt jelle
manni eeksch ta / fakka tas
KUNGS Zebnot: Arrig es
juhs tahs Debbes Lohgus ne
atwehrſchu / un jums Swehti-
schann nobirdinaſchu / ta ka
Schuhnu ne buhs gann.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un juhu deht lammi-
schn es to Rihjeju/ ka wikka
tohs Semmes Augkus juns
buhs maitaht / un tas Wihi-
kohks Eihrumā juns ne bu-
ne-augligs / fakka tas KUNG
Zebnot.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiffi Pagani fl
wehs juhs laimignes/ jo ju-
buhseet weena jauka Semme-
fakka tas KUNGS Zebnot.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Juhfu Wahrdi irr bah-
gi prett mannim / fakka ta-
KUNGS. Tad fakkat juh-
Ro runnajam mehs prett tewi-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Juhs fakkat: Tas i-
welti Deewam kalpoht/ jo kah-
Labbums atlezz/ kad mehs wi-
na Bausli turram ? ka me-
behdiſt staigajam preekſch
KUNGA?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un nu/ mehs turra-
tohs Gresnus laimignes/ jo t-
Besdeewibas - Darritaji pe-
ang/ tatfchu tee Deewu kahr-
na/ un isspruht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad runna tee/ kas i-
KUNGU bihstahs zits uhs zi-
tu/ tomehr tas KUNGS u-
manma un uhsklaufa/ un irr we-
na Peeminneschanns-Grabma-
preekſch winna rakſita/ preekſ-
teem/ kas to KUNGU bihstah-
nn preekſch teem / kas win-
Wahrdiu peeminin.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee buhs/ fakka ta-
KUNGS Zebnot/ tai Deen-
ko es darrischu/ man par Jhp-
schunnu / un es landſeschu tob-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
